novel_features.name: Cost rollup
novel_features.description: Aggregate call cost across the synced store by assistant, day, or phone number.

novel_features.name: Transcript FTS
novel_features.description: Full-text search across every synced call transcript with assistant/date filters.

novel_features.name: Ended-reason histogram
novel_features.description: Group recent calls by endedReason and print counts to surface drop-offs and silence-timeouts.

novel_features.name: Orphan detection
novel_features.description: List tools, files, phone numbers, and workflows that no assistant references.

novel_features.name: Assistant A/B compare
novel_features.description: Side-by-side cost, average duration, and ended-reason distribution for two assistants over a window.

novel_features.name: Stale assistants
novel_features.description: Assistants with no calls in the last N days based on the synced store.

novel_features.name: Bulk-call planner
novel_features.description: Read a CSV of customers and print a planned outbound batch with cost estimate; --dry-run by default.

novel_features.name: Webhook replay
novel_features.description: Re-fire the last N captured webhook events at a forward target without waiting for a real call.

novel_features.name: Live call watch
novel_features.description: Long-poll for newly active or ended calls and print one line per event.

novel_features.name: Assistant drift
novel_features.description: Diff every assistant against a baseline assistant to see system-prompt, model, voice, and tool drift.

description: Every Vapi feature, plus a local SQLite store that makes cost analytics, transcript search, and orphan cleanup possible — none of which the official CLI offers.
